I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.

row.Company: Nyhart, part of FuturePlan by Ascensus
row.Description: Nyhart, part of FuturePlan by Ascensus, is an employee-benefit consulting, actuarial, and administration firm headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana. Established in 1943, Nyhart provides services to over 2,000 clients across all 50 states, including public and private-sector entities, healthcare systems, and educational institutions. As part of FuturePlan by Ascensus, Nyhart leverages proprietary software platforms to deliver actuarial, consulting, and administrative solutions, managing client assets exceeding $20 billion.
